calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST MOTION TO TRANSFER

Appearance:
Avral Kalaf, Esq. of THE FINKLE FIRM, Tel: 213.787.7411, for plaintiff/moving party, via ZOOM videoconference;
No other appearance.

The tentative ruling was uncontested, and adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION TO TRANSFER is Granted. Notice of non-opposition filed. The court orders this case transferred to Orange County. Plaintiff to remit all required transfer fees forthwith.

Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
